region_name: Devon and Torbay Combined County Authority
strap: Devon and Torbay Clean Energy draws £925m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,173 grants, anchored by Exeter (34%), with Met Office and Imerys Minerals on the industrial side. 5 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £185m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Extracting without reinvesting" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
